description.value: Aura faint illusion; CL 3rd; Slot head; Price 7,200 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION This simple leather mask depicts an earless catlike creature. When worn, it melds into its wearerâs face and vanishes, leaving the wearerâs face just as it looked before. Three times per day the wearer can command the mask to appear to retract the wearerâs skin, revealing an illusion of the wearerâs glistening skull and musculature. Creatures within 100 feet who see this display must succeed at a DC 13 Will save or become frightened (if the target has 6 or fewer Hit Dice ) or shaken (if the target has more than 6 HD) for 1d4 rounds. This is a mind-affecting fear effect and a glamer. Anyone who can see through illusions (such as by true seeing ) is unaffected. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, disguise self, scare; Cost 3,600 gp.
